_meta.comment: 履歷唯一真實來源 (single source of truth)。改這裡 → 跑 node resume/generate.mjs 重生所有產物。內容依 2026-07 使用者提供的 PM 一頁式履歷 (PM_陳羿瑄.pdf) 重建。

headline.zh: 產品經理 · 0→1 產品建構 × AI 應用落地
headline.en: Product Manager · 0→1 Product Building × Applied AI

summary.zh: 專注於 0→1 產品建構與 AI 應用落地的產品經理，不只專注單一職能，而是針對問題整合 AI 來解決。具備策略思維與技術理解能力，擅長定義核心問題、設計可規模化的產品架構，並以數據與效率為導向推動產品落地。關注 AI 自動化、決策優化與使用者行為設計。
summary.en: A product manager focused on 0→1 product building and applied AI—solving problems by integrating AI rather than staying inside a single function. Combining strategic thinking with technical fluency, I define core problems, design scalable product architectures, and drive delivery with a data- and efficiency-first mindset. Focused on AI automation, decision optimization, and user-behavior design.

subtitle.zh: AI 產品策略｜自動化建構｜金融科技產品優化

name.zh: 以 Vibe Coding 獨立交付高影響力專案
name.en: Shipped high-impact projects solo with Vibe Coding

bullets.zh: 不佔用工程資源，主動補位、交付團隊長期想做卻始終排不進開發排程的專案。
bullets.en: No engineering resources required—proactively delivering initiatives the team long wanted but could never fit into the dev roadmap.

sub.zh: 為多位財經 KOL 打造課程導購頁，SEO 自然搜尋排名第一，購課轉換率達 55%。
sub.en: Built course landing pages for multiple finance KOLs; #1 in organic search, 55% purchase-conversion rate.

sub.zh: 將老舊桌面端產品改造為網頁版並優化功能，故障率降低 50%，DAU 成長至 2 倍。
sub.en: Rebuilt a legacy desktop product as a web app with enhanced features; 50% fewer failures, 2× DAU.

name.zh: 金融產品 0→1 規劃與交付

bullets.zh: 主導股票 App 核心功能設計，撰寫完整 Spec 並以 Figma 產出設計流程圖與高保真介面，1 週內完成規格與原型交付；重構資訊架構與篩選邏輯，將多層點擊流程簡化為單頁篩選操作，提升看盤與選股效率。
bullets.en: Led core feature design for a stock app; wrote full specs and produced Figma flowcharts and high-fidelity UI, delivering spec and prototype within one week; re-architected information structure and filtering logic, collapsing multi-level clicks into single-page filtering to speed up market-watching and stock selection.

name.zh: 以 AI SaaS 與自動化加速並優化公司工作流程
name.en: Accelerated company workflows with AI SaaS & automation

bullets.zh: 綜觀公司工作流程，收斂出能以 AI 優化加速之節點，兩個月內為行銷、工程、產品部門自動化 40% 重複性工作，並提升效率 85%。
bullets.en: Mapped company workflows and pinpointed AI-accelerable nodes; within two months automated 40% of repetitive work across marketing, engineering, and product, improving efficiency by 85%.

sub.zh: 為解決產品數據分散、缺乏歸因與描述，建立跨平台數據整合架構（GA、Mixpanel、App Store 等），自動化產出數據洞察，讓團隊隨時掌握 30+ 產品即時動態。
sub.en: Built a cross-platform data-integration layer (GA, Mixpanel, App Store, etc.) to fix scattered, unattributed metrics; auto-generated insights keep the team on top of 30+ products in real time.

sub.zh: 規劃「人格模型 → 腳本生成 → 字幕生成 → 短影音產出」自動化流程，建立可規模化內容生產機制，大幅降低人工拍攝與剪輯成本。
sub.en: Designed an automated pipeline (persona model → script → subtitles → short-form video), creating a scalable content-production mechanism that sharply cut manual shooting and editing costs.

name.zh: 引領公司 AI 轉型

bullets.zh: 因應公司需求文件散落、非工程師不易實作，配合公司全面 Agent 開發政策建構 10+ 公司服務 skills，並提供 AI 諮詢，幫助 10+ 位無工程背景 PM 開發出能落地的服務。
bullets.en: To address scattered requirement docs that non-engineers struggled to implement, built 10+ company-service skills under the firm's Agent-development initiative and provided AI consulting, enabling 10+ non-engineer PMs to ship working services.

name.zh: GenInk — Human-AI 協作創作工具

zh: 不是讓 AI 取代創意，而是輔助創作。以曾獲全台編劇首獎的經驗，解決長篇創作中角色設定變動導致全文重寫、成本過高的問題。
en: Not AI replacing creativity but augmenting it—drawing on a national top-screenplay-award background to solve the high cost of rewriting long-form work whenever character settings change.

zh: 為解決減重過程枯燥、用戶難以堅持的痛點，運用八角框架驅動核心內在動機，設計遊戲化關卡系統；帶領四人團隊於兩個月內完成 0→1 產品開發，獲內測用戶高度評價。
en: Tackled the boredom that makes weight-loss hard to sustain by using the Octalysis framework to drive intrinsic motivation and designing a gamified level system; led a 4-person team to ship 0→1 in two months with strong beta-user praise.

degree.zh: 擔任 PM 統籌 0→1 開發並親自實作 UI 與前端工程，於分享會傳承知識；具跨領域協作能力，獲導師高度評價與推薦。
degree.en: PM coordinating 0→1 development while personally building UI and front-end; shared knowledge at meetups. A cross-disciplinary collaborator, highly recommended by mentors.

degree.zh: 影視學系 學士｜全系排名第 1
degree.en: B.A. in Film & Television｜Ranked #1 in department
